remarks: Commercial office space located on the main floor on high traffic East Ave. This suite features: 4 Offices: Ideal for private meetings and focused work. Bullpen Area An ample, well-lit collaborative space designed to foster productivity and teamwork. Private Bathroom: It's convenient for your team and clients. Galley Kitchen: Perfect for breaks and informal meetings. Main Entrance: Welcome your clients to a lobby reception area with a cozy fireplace. This layout includes a central office to the left, two additional offices near the kitchen, and another conveniently positioned across from the private bathroom. Additional Highlights: - Water, Heat and Hot Water Included! Central A/C & Heat, ample parking is available for you and your guests. - Direct access to I-95 for easy commuting and accessibility. Don't miss this exceptional opportunity to elevate your business in a well-designed, accessible space.
